ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicator_data" (
  "indicator_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "geo_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of geographic entity */,
  "geo_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific geographic entity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "data_value" REAL /* The measured data value */,
  "data_value_message" TEXT /* Additional message or note about the data value */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "data_confidence_level" TEXT /* Measure of the confidence in the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_geo_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_entity_id") REFERENCES geo_entities ("geo_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_geo_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_type_id") REFERENCES geo_types ("geo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental health indicator */,
  "measure" TEXT /* The measure of the indicator (e.g., Average Concentration) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the indicator was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_types" (
  "geo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic type */,
  "geo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the geographic type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_entities" (
  "geo_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entity */,
  "geo_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of geographic entity */,
  "geo_entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic entity */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the geographic entity in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic entity */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic entity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the geographic entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_entities_geo_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_type_id") REFERENCES geo_types ("geo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_data_id") REFERENCES indicator_data ("indicator_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator for which the report is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last accessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "indicator_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between an indicator and a data source */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_entity_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "geo_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic entity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic entity */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the geographic entity */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the geographic entity */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnic groups in the geographic entity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_entity_demographics_geo_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_entity_id") REFERENCES geo_entities ("geo_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated indicator */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health outcome */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the health outcome */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the health outcome data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
